notes: Official recruitment provenance was verified for Montage Technology, NAURA and Piotech. Montage exposed eight role blocks, but its shared listing and generic CAPTCHA application form did not provide unique role-level URLs or freshness dates. AMEC remained behind a human-verification control that was not bypassed. NAURA's linked portal was client-rendered without auditable role rows, and Piotech's official recruitment section exposed no current role inventory. No JobImport or JobChanges records were created.
